testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_41] Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider
[NONE][CKV_AWS_386] Reduce potential for WhoAMI cloud image name confusion attack
[NONE][CKV_AWS_46] Ensure no hard-coded secrets exist in EC2 user data
[NONE][CKV_AWS_126] Ensure that detailed monitoring is enabled for EC2 instances
[NONE][CKV_AWS_88] EC2 instance should not have public IP.
[NONE][CKV_AWS_8] Ensure all data stored in the Launch configuration or instance Elastic Blocks Store is securely encrypted
[NONE][CKV_AWS_100] Ensure AWS EKS node group does not have implicit SSH access from 0.0.0.0/0
[NONE][CKV_AWS_100] Ensure AWS EKS node group does not have implicit SSH access from 0.0.0.0/0
[NONE][CKV_AWS_1] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_358] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order
[NONE][CKV_AWS_107] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_108] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration
[NONE][CKV_AWS_109] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_110] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
[NONE][CKV_AWS_283] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow ALL or any AWS principal permissions to the resource
[NONE][CKV_AWS_111] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_356] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_49] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy

[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it

[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it

[NONE][CKV_AWS_63] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_23] Ensure every security group and rule has a description
[NONE][CKV_AWS_24] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
[NONE][CKV_AWS_25] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389

failure.message: Ensure that EC2 is EBS optimized

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.ec2_jump_host.aws_instance.jump_host File: /modules/ec2/main.tf: 43-71 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-ec2-is-ebs-optimized
43 | resource "aws_instance" "jump_host" { 44 | ami = var.ami_id == "" ? data.aws_ami.amazon_linux_2.id : var.ami_id 45 | instance_type = var.jump_host_instance_type 46 | subnet_id = var.public_subnet_ids[0] 47 | vpc_security_group_ids = [module.security_group.finishline_sg_id] 48 | key_name = module.key_pair.key_name 49 | 50 | root_block_device { 51 | volume_size = var.root_volume_size 52 | volume_type = "gp3" 53 | encrypted = true 54 | delete_on_termination = true 55 | } 56 | 57 | monitoring = var.enable_monitoring 58 | user_data_base64 = var.user_data_base64 59 | user_data_replace_on_change = true 60 | 61 | tags = merge({ 62 | Name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-jump-host" 63 | Environment = var.environment 64 | Project = var.project_name 65 | Component = var.component 66 | ManagedBy = var.manage_by 67 | Tier = "Management" 68 | CostCenter = var.cost_center 69 | }, var.tags) 70 | 71 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.finishline_sg.aws_security_group.finishline_sg File: /modules/security_group/main.tf: 1-34 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-382
1 | resource "aws_security_group" "finishline_sg" { 2 | name = "finishline_sg_${var.project_name}" 3 | description = "Allow inbound/outbound traffic for Finishline" 4 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 5 | 6 | dynamic "ingress" { 7 | for_each = var.ingress_rules 8 | 9 | content { 10 | description = ingress.value.description 11 | from_port = ingress.value.from_port 12 | to_port = ingress.value.to_port 13 | protocol = ingress.value.protocol 14 | cidr_blocks = ingress.value.cidr_blocks 15 | } 16 | } 17 | 18 | egress { 19 | description = "Allow all outbound traffic" 20 | from_port = 0 21 | to_port = 0 22 | protocol = "-1" 23 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] # Allow all outbound traffic 24 | } 25 | 26 | tags = { 27 | Name = "finishline_sg_${var.project_name}" 28 | Project = var.project_name 29 | Environment = var.environment 30 | ManageBy = var.manage_by 31 | Terraform = "true" 32 | } 33 | 34 | }

Resource: module.vpc.aws_subnet.finishline_public_subnet[0] File: /modules/vpc/main.tf: 21-34 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-vpc-subnets-do-not-assign-public-ip-by-default
